name: roadmapsmith
description: One-command roadmap generation and maintenance for coding agents, with native Claude GUI slash skills plus the roadmap-sync policy skill.

install.notes: Recommended Claude Code install path for native GUI slash commands like /road, /zero, /maintain, /status, /init, /generate, /validate, /sync, /audit, and /setup. If you install only --skill roadmap-sync, Claude GUI will expose only /roadmap-sync. Install the roadmapsmith CLI separately for actual command execution, then run /reload-skills and, if applicable, /reload-plugins.

skills.name: road
skills.description: Native Claude GUI palette for RoadmapSmith commands and recommended entrypoints.

skills.name: zero
skills.description: Native Claude GUI entrypoint for the one-command Zero Mode CLI workflow.

skills.name: maintain
skills.description: Native Claude GUI entrypoint for the default generate + sync + audit flow.

skills.name: status
skills.description: Native Claude GUI readiness check grounded in roadmapsmith doctor JSON.

skills.name: init
skills.description: Native Claude GUI entrypoint for creating ROADMAP.md and AGENTS.md.

skills.name: generate
skills.description: Native Claude GUI entrypoint for regenerating the managed roadmap block.

skills.name: validate
skills.description: Native Claude GUI entrypoint for evidence-backed roadmap validation.

skills.name: sync
skills.description: Native Claude GUI entrypoint for applying evidence-backed checklist sync.

skills.name: audit
skills.description: Native Claude GUI entrypoint for the current sync-plus-audit workflow.

skills.name: setup
skills.description: Native Claude GUI entrypoint for generating RoadmapSmith host integration files.

skills.name: roadmap-sync
skills.description: Policy and operating rules for RoadmapSmith plus the legacy /roadmap-sync Claude entrypoint.
